query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by bygningid ascending.

1.description: Get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Get buildings in Kristiansand (prefiltered by kommunenummer)

3.description: Get 200-year storm-surge areas in Kristiansand (prefiltered by kommunenummer)

4.description: Get 200-year flood zones in Kristiansand (prefiltered by kommunenummer)

executions.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    kommunenavn = 'Kristiansand';
